title: When can I make a claim to the Seller Support Center?
bodyHtml:
As per our Back Market policies and guidelines, any claims you may want to make, whether related to a refund or to disputing an action taken by a Back Market agent, must be submitted within three months from the date when the refund appeared in your invoice, or from when our Back market agent took the action you wish to dispute.

We understand that claim denials can be disappointing, and we want to assure you that we are committed to providing a great service to you, and we encourage you to reach out to us promptly for any claims that fall within the specified timeframes.

We are here to assist you and address any concerns you may have, however, beware that we will not be able to make any exceptions to this as all sellers are bound to follow the same rules.
